title: pouteria robusta
intro: Pouteria robusta, also known as the Tallowwood tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. This tree has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Pouteria robusta are said to provide health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Pouteria robusta are typically made from the bark and leaves, and can be used in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
